{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322105059FDE261556E0AEFB117C7"}"},"total":1495},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7589196375021503256","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是本被分数低估的小说，末世文内容在这本书上体现了很清晰。有很多残酷无情，可以说把绝望到希望，人性的善到恶的转变，没有爱情、但亲情写的很好。
非常喜欢这个开头，没有圣母没有墨迹，说掐就掐。
固然有不逻辑的地方但不影响观看，衔接的新内容真的写的很好很新颖，不是那种一样的内容一样的结局。
结局也是开放结局，为前面看了这么久收官，也很期待番外篇那种[偷笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766998593,"group_id":"7500482319279459352","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N37lEvv27SvD541prPIROAo=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776700848&x-signature=IqKiHTwWvdI9JXrGcbswfncov9s%3D","user_id":"844901257324515","user_name":"爱吃白灼海螺的冷陌"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"844901257324515","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7500482319279459352","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世+心狠手黑+重生+空间异能+无CP+种田+巨粗金手指】
一种不知名的病毒在全国蔓延，感染病毒的人会变成丧尸。
彻底沦为一具行尸走肉。
全球百分之六十的人都丧尸化。
气候也发生了巨变，环境遭到破坏，自然灾害不断。
在这场灾难当中存活下来的动物和植物，也发生了异变。
活下来的幸存人类建造了安全基地，筑起高墙，将丧尸和变异怪物隔绝在外。
……
在末世打拼七年，苏允终于拿到了进入安全基地的名额。
却在进行基因检测的时候，被查出感染了丧尸病毒。
后妈：“虽然你感染了病毒，但名额不能作废，不如就让给妹妹……。”
亲爸：“趁着你现在还有意识，把名额转让给你妹妹吧。”
苏允，在外她时刻小心警惕着，哪怕是和丧尸战斗的时候。
从来没有被丧尸抓伤咬伤。
能感染丧尸病毒，也只能是身边的人对她下手。
彻底尸化的时候，苏允用安全基地名额作为诱饵。
将渣爹和后妈以及妹妹哄骗到她的租屋，将他们全部咬死。
没想到一睁眼，却回到了丧尸爆发的第七天。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3ad26ec26a4f62a4ec173e8bfac23786","author":"阿树tn","author_id":"","book_id":"7500482319279459352","book_name":"全球尸变，重生回到末世第七天","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7500482408592982552","read_count":"53721","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1008338"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"666","tags":"科幻末世,重生,空间,末世,无CP,囤物资","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2of5ac32f0878cb23c7e1b405b3a9eda9d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779331859&x-signature=qMccl6PHowu9f%2F9E2BrNnVaWAsQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4473251657680648","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1435"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322105059FDE261556E0AEFB117C7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读76小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":161573,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":272334,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2493},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7537240841730179902","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"重要的事情说三遍：好书！好书！好书！超级好书。剧情前后衔接流畅，主角决策很果断。要是作者大大能把前面的一些文字细节错误修复了就更好了。[求爆更]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754903128,"group_id":"7500482319279459352","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人生是会突然变好的，也许是某天灵光一现，也许遇到某个重要的人，命运的齿轮便从这一刻开始转动。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzRFPlH21Q9SzND+Nayu1zrvUyKXmfTx7JNF5qVq9Snk","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7264792ac85b4c3fad49e3ac7ed6453a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703571&x-signature=bFcmDdVvlOvhRsfYkCeOPDb8J%2BA%3D","user_id":"3721221923159022","user_name":"晚安（wan）"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3721221923159022","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7500482319279459352","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世+心狠手黑+重生+空间异能+无CP+种田+巨粗金手指】
